name: Twenty Minute Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the beaten egg, cream, vanilla, salt, and sugar until well mixed.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter together in a saucepan or microwave, then add to the mixture. Stir until smooth.
3. Fold in the chopped nuts.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8x8 inch (inches) pan that has been greased with butter.
5. Allow the fudge to cool at room temperature for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
6. Once set, cut into squares and serve.
Makes 1 1/3 pounds fudge.
